description: Machine learning: clustering, dimensionality reduction, and predictive modeling tests

tests.prompt: Cluster the customers into 5 segments based on their purchasing behavior
Run K-means clustering on the standardized features
tests.dataset_context: features dataset: x1, x2, x3, x4, x5

tests.prompt: Use DBSCAN to find density-based clusters and identify outliers
Reduce the dimensionality of the gene expression data using PCA
Extract the principal components and their explained variance ratios
tests.dataset_context: multivariate dataset: x1, x2, x3, x4, x5, x6

tests.prompt: Run hierarchical clustering with Ward linkage
Visualize the high-dimensional data in 2D using t-SNE
Train a random forest to predict house prices
tests.dataset_context: housing dataset: price, sqft, bedrooms, bathrooms, location_score

tests.prompt: Get feature importances from the random forest model
tests.dataset_context: prediction dataset: target, feature1, feature2, feature3, feature4

tests.prompt: Train an SVM classifier for the binary classification problem
tests.dataset_context: classification dataset: label (0/1), x1, x2, x3

tests.prompt: Run factor analysis to identify latent constructs in the survey data
tests.dataset_context: survey dataset: q1, q2, q3, q4, q5, q6, q7, q8

tests.prompt: Compute Mahalanobis distances to detect multivariate outliers
tests.dataset_context: multivar dataset: x1, x2, x3, x4
